Elite goal scorer with 36G-79PTS and massive 231 SOG. Utah allows quality chances and Robertson benefits from Dallas home ice in favorable spot.

Elite defenseman with 19G-67PTS and 25.0 TOI. Pittsburgh's defensive struggles and goaltending issues create premium upside for Makar's offensive contributions.

Impressive 33G-58PTS with 207 SOG provides solid floor. Value play despite tough matchup as Utah's young scorer shows consistent production.
Elite goaltending metrics with .918 SV% and 2.16 GAA. Pittsburgh as road favorites creates solid win probability for Wedgewood with save upside.

props.reason: MacKinnon leads Colorado with 44 goals and 287 shots on goal, demonstrating elite scoring frequency. His 22.2 minutes TOI shows heavy reliance in crucial situations against a Pittsburgh team with subpar goaltending.

DeBrincat leads Detroit with 234 shots in 68 games (3.44 per game), just under this line but trending up. Calgary's Dustin Wolf has struggled with a .897 save percentage, encouraging more shot volume from Detroit's top scorer.

Robertson has 79 points in 66 games and leads Dallas with 231 shots, showing consistent offensive production. Utah's goaltending has been inconsistent with Vejmelka's .897 save percentage providing scoring opportunities.

Pastrnak averages 3.53 shots per game with 219 in 62 games, but his 20.7 minutes TOI indicates heavy usage. New Jersey's Markstrom has an .885 save percentage, likely encouraging Boston to feed their top shooter more frequently.

Kempe has 26 goals and 187 shots in 66 games with solid 19.3 minutes TOI showing consistent offensive role. New York's goaltending has been inconsistent with Quick posting just .892 save percentage in recent starts.

Panarin has 70 points in 63 games with elite 20.8 minutes TOI and 186 shots showing consistent offensive production. His playmaking ability should thrive against a Kings defense that has struggled defensively this season.

Guenther leads Utah with 33 goals and 207 shots in 65 games, averaging 3.18 shots per game. His 17.3 minutes TOI and role as primary scorer should see increased shot volume against Dallas goaltending.

Necas has 80 points with 31 goals, indicating 49 assists and strong playmaking ability with 21.3 minutes TOI. Pittsburgh's defensive struggles and Colorado's offensive depth should create multiple assist opportunities for the skilled forward.

Backlund has 38 points in 67 games with solid 17.8 minutes TOI showing consistent offensive contribution. Detroit's defensive issues and goaltending struggles should provide scoring opportunities for Calgary's veteran center.

Raymond has 67 points in 66 games with 143 shots and 18.7 minutes TOI showing elite offensive production. Calgary's goaltending struggles with Wolf's .897 save percentage should create multiple scoring opportunities for Detroit's top playmaker.
